title: Vedanta is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vedanta is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!
